productDisplayName: Nike Kids Unisex Sport Hi Quarter  Pack of 3 Pink Socks
description: It's comfort unparalleled once you slip into any one of these pair of socks from nike. Made of 77% cotton, 22% nylon  and 1% spandex, these socks are perfect for Sports and casual outings.Made of cotton, nylon and spandex, it provides all-day comfort, stretch and moisture wicking propertiesThe arch support offers a secure, stable Fit1st pair is pink with light pibk and purple bands2nd pair is white with a wide pink bands under the cuffs3rd pair is purple with a thin white band under the cuffsBrand name woven on the side of the cuffs for all three pairsRib knit cuff with roomy toe area for superior comfort and durabilitySock careMachine wash cold in 30 degree water Use non-chlorine bleachTumble dry lowDo not iron or dry clean
